items.title: Tanlong Environment homepage hero redesign
items.caption: 1920x1080 desktop hero composite. Tanlong industrial background plus deterministic brand lockup, navigation, headline, metrics, CTA, and business entries.
items.prompt: Adapt the premium full-screen industrial hero layout to Tanlong Environment / 坦隆环境, replacing all brand, proof, technology, and navigation text deterministically.
